# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
  "name": "acme/app",
  "description": "Application with automated setup and asset compilation via Composer scripts",
  "type": "project",
  "license": "proprietary",
  "require": {
    "php": "^8.1"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "post-install-cmd": [
      "@setup"
    ],
    "post-update-cmd": [
      "@setup"
    ],
    "setup": [
      "php -r \"file_exists('.env') || (file_exists('.env.example') ? copy('.env.example', '.env') : true);\"",
      "php scripts/setup.php",
      "php scripts/build-assets.php",
      "php -r \"$u='https://example.com/assets/app.bundle.js'; $d='public/assets/app.bundle.js'; if (!is_dir(dirname($d))) { mkdir(dirname($d), 0775, true); } $data=@file_get_contents($u); if ($data === false) { fwrite(STDERR, 'Failed to download: '.$u.PHP_EOL); exit(1); } file_put_contents($d, $data);\"",
      "php -r \"$u='https://example.com/assets/app.bundle.css'; $d='public/assets/app.bundle.css'; if (!is_dir(dirname($d))) { mkdir(dirname($d), 0775, true); } $data=@file_get_contents($u); if ($data === false) { fwrite(STDERR, 'Failed to download: '.$u.PHP_EOL); exit(1); } file_put_contents($d, $data);\"",
      "sh -lc \"mkdir -p var/cache var/log public/assets\"",
      "sh -lc \"[ -f package.json ] && (command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1 && npm ci && npm run build) || true\"",
      "sh -lc \"[ -f bin/console ] && php bin/console cache:clear --no-interaction || true\"",
      "php scripts/post-install.php"
    ]
  },
  "config": {
    "sort-packages": true,
    "preferred-install": "dist",
    "optimize-autoloader": true
  },
  "minimum-stability": "stable",
  "prefer-stable": true
}
